contents:
# Ukraine’s Security Service Strikes Russian Transeft Perm Linear Production Dispatch Station

## Overview
Ukrainian forces struck the Transeft Perm Linear Production Dispatch Station, a strategic hub for Russia’s oil pipeline system, causing fires to almost all oil storage tanks at the station. The station distributes oil in all four directions, including to the Perm Oil Refinery. Geolocated footage confirms fires at the site.

## Reporting Window
- Reported timeframe: April 29, 2026
- Location: Perm Oblast, Russia

## Key Details
- Ukrainian Security Service (SBU) reported the strike on April 29.
- Fires affected nearly all oil storage tanks.
- Station remains critical for Russia’s oil distribution network.
- Part of broader Ukrainian long-range strikes on 18 Russian oil infrastructure sites in April 2026.
- Geolocated footage published on April 29 shows the fires.

## Source Context
The @NatalieRevolts account on X (Twitter) covers Natalie Revolts's subject area as documented in this repository's source manifest. The development above appears in news reporting that aligns with the topical scope this account monitors. Verification stems from the cited publication, not from a direct tweet capture (Twitter API access remained blocked during this collection cycle).
